overview: TeamFlow is a unified collaborative workspace with 11 functional modules — Tasks, Documents, Chat, Calendar, Sheets, Notes, Presentations, Projects, People, Activity, and Settings — all sharing a single design system.
features: Internet Identity login with real user accounts
Inline onboarding flow for new users
Admin, Member, and Viewer role-based access control
Protected routes and landing page CTA integration
Settings for workspace management and member roles
